texts.content:
Campus Parking Registration – Spring Semester

All students who plan to park on campus must register their vehicles by January 15.

Registration is available online through the Student Portal. Fee: $120 per semester.

Unregistered vehicles parked on campus after January 20 will be ticketed and may be towed at the owner's expense.

Questions? Contact Campus Security at parking@university.edu.

questions.stem: What will happen to unregistered vehicles after January 20?
options: A. They will receive a warning only.
B. They will be ticketed and may be towed.
C. They will be automatically registered.
D. They will be banned from future registration.
questions.explanation: The announcement states unregistered vehicles 'will be ticketed and may be towed at the owner's expense.'

questions.stem: What can be inferred about parking registration?
options: A. It is free for all students.
B. It must be completed in person.
D. It is only required for faculty.
questions.explanation: The fee is explicitly listed as '$120 per semester.'

texts.content:
Campus Bookstore – End of Semester Buyback!

Bring your used textbooks to the bookstore this week and get up to 50% cash back!

Accepted: Books in good condition with no missing pages or excessive writing.
Not accepted: Custom editions, workbooks with written answers, or access code-only packages.

Location: Student Center, 1st Floor
Hours: 9 AM – 6 PM, Monday–Friday

questions.stem: Which item would likely be accepted for buyback?
options: A. A workbook with all answers filled in
C. A standard textbook with minimal highlighting
D. An access code card without a book
questions.explanation: Standard textbooks in good condition are accepted; custom editions, filled workbooks, and access code-only packages are not.
